data.title: Ateam Holdings Achieves Prime Market Compliance and Reports Strong FY2025 Results
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An announcement from Ateam Inc. ( (JP:3662) ) is now available.

Ateam Holdings Co., Ltd. announced its compliance with the Prime Market listing criteria, effective July 31, 2025, marking a significant milestone in its market positioning. The company also reported a total return ratio of 181.6% for FY2025 and plans to introduce progressive dividends and interim dividends starting FY2026 to maintain a total return ratio average of 100% as per its Medium-Term Business Plan. Additionally, the company achieved profit growth and generally performed well against earnings forecasts, with plans for continued revenue growth in FY2026.

More about Ateam Inc.

Ateam Holdings Co., Ltd. operates in the digital marketing and entertainment sectors, focusing on optimizing business management structures and enhancing its business portfolio.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Papyrus Australia Ltd ( (AU:PPY) ) has shared an announcement.

Papyrus Australia Ltd has announced the cessation of Jim (Zhaojing) Huang as a director, effective from September 4, 2025. The notice indicates that Huang holds no relevant interests in securities or contracts with the company, suggesting a straightforward departure without financial entanglements. This change in the board could impact the company’s strategic direction and governance, although no immediate implications for stakeholders are detailed.

More about Papyrus Australia Ltd

Papyrus Australia Ltd operates within the sustainable materials industry, focusing on the development and commercialization of environmentally friendly products derived from banana tree trunks. The company aims to provide sustainable alternatives to traditional wood-based products, targeting markets that prioritize eco-friendly solutions.

data.title: Ørsted Approves New Share Capital Authorization with Pre-emptive Rights
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An announcement from Orsted ( (DOGEF) ) is now available.

At an extraordinary general meeting, Ørsted A/S approved a new authorization for its Board of Directors to increase the company’s share capital with pre-emptive rights for existing shareholders, while repealing the previous authorization to do so without pre-emptive rights. This decision reflects Ørsted’s strategic focus on shareholder value and may impact its capital structure and market positioning.

More about Orsted

Ørsted is a Danish company focused on green energy solutions, developing and operating offshore and onshore wind farms, solar farms, energy storage facilities, and bioenergy plants. It is recognized as a global leader in climate action and was the first energy company to have its net-zero emissions target validated by the Science Based Targets initiative. Ørsted is listed on Nasdaq Copenhagen and employs approximately 8,200 people.

data.title: China Cinda Completes Share Transfer to Central Huijin
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

China Cinda Asset Management Co ( (HK:1359) ) has provided an update.

China Cinda Asset Management Co., Ltd. announced the completion of a gratuitous transfer of shares from its controlling shareholder, the Ministry of Finance of the People’s Republic of China, to Central Huijin Investment Ltd. This transfer, involving over 22 billion domestic shares, makes Central Huijin the new controlling shareholder, holding approximately 58% of the company’s total issued shares. Despite this change, China Cinda remains a state-owned holding financial institution, and stakeholders are advised to exercise caution when dealing with the company’s shares.

More about China Cinda Asset Management Co

China Cinda Asset Management Co., Ltd. operates in the financial sector as a state-owned holding financial institution in China. It primarily focuses on asset management and financial services, with a significant market presence due to its state backing.

data.title: Rana Gruber ASA Secures Iron Ore Swap Contracts for Q4 2025
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Rana Gruber AS ( (DE:7XH) ) has issued an update.

Rana Gruber ASA has entered into iron ore swap contracts for Q4 2025, agreeing to sell 15,000 metric tons per month at an average price of $103.75 per metric ton. These contracts, which relate to physical shipments in Q3 2025, are part of a broader strategy involving a total volume of 390,000 metric tons across multiple quarters, potentially stabilizing revenue and providing predictability for stakeholders.

More about Rana Gruber AS

Rana Gruber ASA is a Norwegian iron ore producer established in 1964, leveraging over 200 years of mining experience. The company processes and exports natural mineral resources to global customers, including steel producers and the chemical industry, with a production capacity of 1.8 million metric tons of iron ore concentrates.

data.title: Mare Group Secures Approval for INNOVA-AI Project
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest update is out from Mare Engineering Group SpA ( (IT:MARE) ).

Mare Group S.p.A. has received approval from the Ministry of Enterprises and Made in Italy for its three-year project, INNOVA-AI, a scalable no-code platform designed to offer customized Artificial Intelligence solutions for businesses. The project, valued at over 4 million euros, aims to enhance business competitiveness by providing strategic insights and data-driven support, while ensuring data privacy and security. This initiative aligns with the growing European demand for technological autonomy and strengthens Mare Group’s position in the innovation ecosystem.

More about Mare Engineering Group SpA

Founded in 2001, Mare Group S.p.A. is an engineering company listed on Euronext Growth Milan. It operates in the innovation sector through proprietary technology platforms and has a significant presence in the market with over 2,000 clients and a team of more than 500 people. The company has expanded its product portfolio and market presence through significant investments in R&D and 16 acquisitions since 2019.

Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd. ( (AU:SEC) ) just unveiled an update.

Spheria Emerging Companies Limited has announced its estimated pre-tax Net Tangible Asset (NTA) backing per share as of September 4, 2025, at $2.627. This figure, which is unaudited and approximate, reflects the daily value of the company’s investment portfolio and cash balances, adjusted for various fees and estimated operating costs. The announcement provides stakeholders with insight into the company’s financial standing, although it excludes certain tax provisions and deferred tax assets.

The latest announcement is out from Elsight Ltd. ( (AU:ELS) ).

S&P Dow Jones Indices has announced the quarterly rebalance of the S&P/ASX Indices, effective September 22, 2025. The changes include additions and removals across various indices, such as Technology One Limited being added to the S&P/ASX 50 Index and Treasury Wine Estates Limited being removed. These adjustments reflect the shifting dynamics in the market and can impact the positioning of companies within the indices, potentially affecting investor decisions and company valuations.
